Nnormal1st1H.AltName: Attack consumption stamina multiplier one-handed weak 1 [x]

strong1st1H.AltName: Attack consumption stamina multiplier one-handed strong 1 [x]

jump1H.AltName: Attack consumption stamina multiplier one-handed jump [x]
